zh.lifeSummary: 當Abel Vinton於1784年8月30日出生在美國麻薩諸塞州伍斯特杜德利時，他的父親Joseph Vinton26歲，母親Mary Allard25歲。他於1810年與Betsey Merrick在美國康乃狄克州結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1860年住在美國愛阿華州亨利韋恩 堂史普。他去世在美國俄亥俄州。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Abel Vinton于1784年8月30日出生在美国马萨诸塞州伍斯特杜德利时，他的父亲Joseph Vinton26岁，母亲Mary Allard25岁。他于1810年与Betsey Merrick在美国康涅狄格州结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1860年住在美国艾奥瓦州亨利韋恩 堂史普。他去世在美国俄亥俄州。

nameMeanings.name: Vinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of   Finton   with voicing of the initial consonant (see   Fenton  ). In Sussex and Kent the name was probably confused with   Winton  .

variants.name: Finton
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Fenton  .

nameMeanings.name: Abel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the younger son of Adam and Eve, who was murdered for reasons of jealousy by his brother Cain (Genesis 4:1–8). The Hebrew form is Hevel, ostensibly representing the vocabulary word hevel ‘breath, vapour’, and so taken to imply vanity or worthlessness. Abel is considered by the Christian Church to have been a pre-Christian martyr (see Matthew 23:35), and is invoked as a saint in the litany for the dying. Nevertheless, his name has not been much used either before or after its brief vogue among the Puritans.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.
Ohio was the first state admitted to the Union from the Northwest Territory.

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.

historicEvents.title: Kirtland Temple Dedicated
historicEvents.description: On March 27, 1836, the Kirtland Temple was dedicated.

historicEvents.title: Ohio supports the Union side of the Civil War
historicEvents.description: Although divided as a state on the subject of slavery, Ohio participated in the Civil War on the Union's side, providing over 300,000 troops. Ohio provided the 3rd largest number of troops by any Union state.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Ohio supports the Union side of the Civil War

historicEvents.title: A Treaty with Hawaii
historicEvents.description: In the Mid 1870s, The United States sought out the Kingdom of Hawaii to make a free trade agreement. The Treaty gave the Hawaiians access to the United States agricultural markets and it gave the United States a part of land which later became Pearl Harbor.

historicEvents.title: There is now a Capital Building
historicEvents.description: The capitol building in Des Moines originally had a budget of $1,500,000 but complications arose because of the need of a redesign. The building was dedicated on January 17, 1884, but it wasn’t completed until 1886. On January 4, 1904, a fire started and swept through the areas that housed the Supreme Court and Iowa House of Representatives. A major restoration was performed and documented, with the addition of electrical lighting, elevators, and a telephone system. By the early 1980s, the sandstone exterior of the Capitol had started deteriorating and prompted the installation of canopies to protect pedestrians from falling rubble. The entire reconstruction process took around 18 years to complete.
historicEvents.urlTitle: The History of the Iowa Capitol Building in Des Moines

en.lifeSummary: When Abel Vinton was born on 30 August 1784, in Dudley, Worcester, Massachusetts, United States, his father, Joseph Vinton, was 26 and his mother, Mary Allard, was 25. He married Betsey Merrick in 1810, in Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Wayne Township, Henry, Iowa, United States in 1860. He died in Ohio, United States.

Il a épousé Betsey Merrick en 1810, à Connecticut, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Wayne Township, Henry, Iowa, États-Unis en 1860. Il est décédé à Ohio, États-Unis.

ja.lifeSummary: Abel Vintonが1784年8月30日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ウオルセスターダドリーで生まれた時，父Joseph Vintonは26歳，母Mary Allardは25歳であった。1810年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州でBetsey Merrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1860年にはアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州ヘンリーワイン トウンシュイップに住んでいた。彼はアメリカ合衆国オハイオ州で死去した。

ko.Wayne Township, Henry, Iowa, United Stat: 미국 아이오와 주 헨리 웨이인 타운시프
ko.lifeSummary: Abel Vinton(이)가 1784년 8월 30일 미국 매사추세츠 주 워스스터 드들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Joseph Vinton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Allard(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1810년 미국 코네티컷 주에서 Betsey Merrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1860년도에 미국 아이오와 주 헨리 웨이인 타운시프에서 살았다. 그는 미국 오하이오 주에서 사망했다.

ru.Wayne Township, Henry, Iowa, United Stat: веин тоуншип, хенри, Айова, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abel Vinton родился 30 августа 1784 г. в местности дудли, ворсестир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Joseph Vinton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Allard, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Betsey Merrick в 1810 г. в местности Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности веин тоуншип, хенри, Айова, Соединенные штаты в 1860 году. Он умер в местности Огайо, Соединенные штаты.
